textPlain: This went into quite a bit more detail than just how the mosaic was animated. That was a nice surprise, a thoughtful summary of several things that went into the project.
That would be a great screensaver. Also, one that's only NSFW would be cool.
A very quick, pleasing read. And it's got a nice aesthetic.
